data.name: The link to the brand's home page.
data.value: The link to the brand's home page.

data.name: Allow users to adjust their nickname in the profile management page.
data.value: Allow users to adjust their nickname in the profile management page.

data.name: Comma-separated BCP-47 language codes to translate documents into, e.g. en-US,ja-JP,ko-KR,fr-FR,zh-CN. Leave empty or set to a single language to disable AI translation.
data.value: Comma-separated BCP-47 language codes to translate documents into, e.g. en-US,ja-JP,ko-KR,fr-FR,zh-CN. Leave empty or set to a single language to disable AI translation.

data.name: Master switch for semantic (vector-based) search. When enabled and the embedding model is configured, search results display a green \"Search based on AI (Vector Database)\" badge and use cosine similarity ranking. When disabled or not configured, search silently falls back to keyword matching. Requires Embedding Endpoint and Embedding Model.
data.value: Master switch for semantic (vector-based) search. When enabled and the embedding model is configured, search results display a green "Search based on AI (Vector Database)" badge and use cosine similarity ranking. When disabled or not configured, search silently falls back to keyword matching. Requires Embedding Endpoint and Embedding Model.

data.name: Max Comments Per Day Per User
data.value: Maximum Comments Per Day Per User

data.name: Maximum number of cached query embeddings in the database. When exceeded, the least recently accessed entries are evicted (LRU). Default 2000. Adjust based on your database capacity and expected query diversity.
data.value: The maximum number of cached query embeddings in the database. When this limit is exceeded, the least recently accessed entries are evicted (LRU). Default is 2000. Adjust according to your database capacity and expected query diversity.

data.name: The backup URL of the git repository. Used if the primary URL fails.
data.value: The backup URL of the Git repository. Used if the primary URL fails.

data.name: The bearer token for authenticating with the Embedding Endpoint, e.g. 5a0fbdefa19f.... Falls back to OpenAI API Token when empty.
data.value: The bearer token for authenticating with the Embedding Endpoint, e.g. 5a0fbdefa19f.... Falls back to the OpenAI API Token when empty.

data.name: The bearer token for authenticating with the OpenAI Chat Endpoint, e.g. sk-abc123... or 5a0fbdefa19f.... Leave empty if the endpoint does not require authentication.
data.value: The bearer token for authenticating with the OpenAI Chat Endpoint, e.g. sk-abc123... or 5a0fbdefa19f.... Leave empty if the endpoint does not require authentication.

data.name: The brand name displayed in the footer.
data.value: The brand name displayed in the footer.

data.name: The embedding model name for vector search, e.g. bge-m3:latest. Must be available at the Embedding Endpoint. Only used for vector search, not for translation.
data.value: The embedding model name for vector search, e.g. bge-m3:latest. Must be available at the Embedding Endpoint. Only used for vector search, not for translation.

data.name: The ICP license number for China mainland users. Leave empty to hide.
data.value: The ICP license number for China mainland users. Leave empty to hide.

data.name: The LLM model name used for translating documents, e.g. qwen3.5:27b-q8_0, gpt-4o, or deepseek-chat. Must be available at the OpenAI Chat Endpoint above. Unrelated to embedding/vector search.
data.value: The LLM model name used for translating documents, e.g. qwen3.5:27b-q8_0, gpt-4o, or deepseek-chat. Must be available at the OpenAI Chat Endpoint above. Unrelated to embedding/vector search.

data.name: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Support jpg, png, svg.
data.value: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Support jpg, png, svg.

data.name: The maximum number of comments a user can post per day.
data.value: The maximum number of comments a user can post per day.

data.name: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.
data.value: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.

data.name: The Ollama API base URL used specifically for generating document and query embeddings (vector search). Only the host is used — /api/embed is appended automatically. Falls back to the OpenAI Chat Endpoint when empty. E.g. https://ollama.example.com
data.value: The Ollama API base URL used specifically for generating document and query embeddings (vector search). Only the host is used — /api/embed is appended automatically. Falls back to the OpenAI Chat Endpoint when empty. E.g. https://ollama.example.com

data.name: The OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint used for document translation. Must be the full URL including /v1/chat/completions, e.g. https://ollama.example.com/v1/chat/completions or https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions. Unrelated to embedding/vector search.
data.value: The OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint used for document translation. Must be the full URL including /v1/chat/completions, e.g. https://ollama.example.com/v1/chat/completions or https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions. Unrelated to embedding/vector search.

data.name: The URL of the git repository containing the markdown documents.
data.value: The URL of the git repository containing the Markdown documents.
